title: Senior AI/ML Engineer
description:
We are seeking a highly experienced Senior AI/ML Engineer to join our team. As a Senior AI/ML Engineer, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and deploying AI/ML models and algorithms. You will work closely with our data science team to identify business problems and develop solutions.

Responsibilities:
- Design, develop, and deploy AI/ML models and algorithms
- Collaborate with data scientists to identify business problems and develop solutions
- Work with cross-functional teams to integrate AI/ML models into products
- Optimize AI/ML models for performance and scalability
- Stay up-to-date with industry trends and advancements in AI/ML

Must-have skills:
- Python
- PyTorch
- TensorFlow
- Cuda
- SQL
- Machine Learning
- Deep Learning
- Natural Language Processing

Nice to have:
- Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure)
- Knowledge of containerization (Docker)
- Familiarity with agile development methodologies
